rows.label: tev066301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask De Zing about the xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask De Zing about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask De Zing about the indigens in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_SEL2012
rows.name: Ask De Zing about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask De Zing what makes Six Stars weapons special.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask De Zing about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0001
rows.name:
I came to this city to learn about
the strangers whose strength surpasses
both the Growth's and our own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0002
rows.name:
And what a wondrous city this NLA
is! The Ma-non especially possess
technology that boggles the mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0003
rows.name:
They can create precious metals from
miranium, and bend steel to their
bidding without even employing heat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Can you imagine the miraculous blade we
could forge if the Ma-non and I merged our
techniques? It would be beyond belief![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0007
rows.name:
You stand before De Zing, finest
swordsmith of all the Larsians,
and a genius of rarefied stature![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0008
rows.name:
I work here with my apprentice Gi Nagri
to craft parts for Six Stars, while
pursuing my own masterworks on the side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Heh! I suppose you want to know what I am making.
I wager your curiosity is so unbearable, you might
not sleep if I refrain from telling you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0010
rows.name: Well, the truth is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Bah, forget it. This figment of a
blade needs remain inside the
scabbard of my mind. ...For now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG0012
rows.name:
When the time has come, I will reveal
its glory. You shall marvel at the
dream I intend to make real![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2001
rows.name:
I encountered a fearsome monster of a bird at
the summit of Mount M'gando. More than thrice
did I attempt to vanquish the beast, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2002
rows.name:
Well, not even my unbreakable
sword could see the deed done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2003
rows.name:
Still, I have not given up. I will
grow stronger—as strong as it takes
to turn the creature's lifeblood cold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2004
rows.name:
Then Cauldros will know its
new, true master! Ha ha ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2006
rows.name:
I meant to ask—how fares
Gi Nagri? Is he well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2007
rows.name:
If you see him, tell him the
forge is in his hands now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2008
rows.name:
While my giant shoes will be difficult for
a sprog like him to fill, he has spent many
years observing my impeccable technique.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2009
rows.name:
If he keeps at it, a score of years
from now he ought to exhibit at
least a shadow of my talent. Ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG2010
rows.name:
And unlike me, he has Niilop's
outstanding technology to fall
back upon if all else fails.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3001
rows.name:
There is no substance a Larsian
artisan's blade cannot cleave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3002
rows.name:
I have seen your weapons and compared them.
Their destructive capabilities have yet to
surpass weapons of Six Stars manufacture.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3003
rows.name:
Real warriors charge in fiercely and smite their
enemies in a single blow. So if you are a warrior
true, you must thirst for our weapons![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3006
rows.name:
Ah, it's you! Your timing is perfect,
for I have decided to reveal the
next masterwork I have in store![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3007
rows.name:
It will be an unbreakable blade so large
that a Doll will have to wield it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3008
rows.name:
Of course, this endeavor is too genius to
complete on my own. I will need Gi Nagri to
apply himself more than ever. And not only him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3009
rows.name:
I require Niilop! Her help in
this project is a necessity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066301_MSG3010
rows.name:
I will go there every day if I have to, until
the stubborn Ma-non gives me an "aye." And not
one with a question on the end, either![ST:wait ]
